title: MagicBricks South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: MagicBricks South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the MagicBricks South Asia Partners family as a Full Stack Developer in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MagicBricks South Asia Partners:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks South Asia Partners!
